name: Skull Conductor
name_jp: スカル・コンダクター
desc: If this card is face-up on the field at the end of the Battle Phase: Destroy this face-up card. You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; Special Summon up to 2 Zombie-Type monsters from your hand whose combined ATK is exactly 2000.
mnst_eff: If this card is face-up on the field at the end of the Battle Phase: Destroy this face-up card. You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; Special Summon up to 2 Zombie-Type monsters from your hand whose combined ATK is exactly 2000.
eff: If this card is face-up on the field at the end of the Battle Phase: Destroy this face-up card. You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; Special Summon up to 2 Zombie-Type monsters from your hand whose combined ATK is exactly 2000.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 4: Joey's World Mega Pack

jp_sets.set: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's Wheelie Breakers Perfect Ride promotional card

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
